caption.full:
Power:: Origins reveals young Ghost and Tommy in first look images

Starz has released first-look images and an early teaser for its upcoming prequel series, Power:: Origins. Spence Moore will play James 'Ghost' St. Patrick and Charlie Mann will portray Tommy Egan. Mekai Curtis will reprise his role as the young Kanan Stark in the series.

Which actor’s casting are you most excited for, and what do you hope to see from the series?

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

#PowerBook #TVNews #PowerOrigins #GhostAndTommy
caption.firstComment: Spence Moore and Charlie Mann stepping into Ghost and Tommy’s younger years feels surreal — who are you picturing for the roles, and what moment from the prequel are you most eager to see?
